Class ReadOnlyUUIDProperty

java.lang.Object
com.stardevllc.starlib.observable.property.readonly.ReadOnlyUUIDProperty

Observable, ObservableValue<UUID>, Property<UUID>, ReadOnlyProperty<UUID>, ObservableObjectValue<UUID>, ObservableUUIDValue
